scripts.db:setup: npm run db:create && npm run db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate: npm run env:create && prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migration: npm run env:create && prisma migrate dev --name
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test npm run env:create && NODE_ENV=test npm run db:setup && jest --run-in-band --coverage; NODE_ENV=test npm run db:drop
scripts.test:ci: NODE_ENV=test npm run db:migrate && prisma generate && jest --run-in-band --coverage --coverageReporters=lcov
